name: BWX Technologies, Inc.
content: BWX Technologies (BWXT) is a specialty manufacturer of nuclear components and fuel, primarily serving the U.S. government and the commercial nuclear power industry. The company is a key supplier for the Naval Nuclear Propulsion Program and provides critical engineering and manufacturing services for Small Modular Reactors (SMRs) and advanced nuclear technologies. With a massive backlog and a dominant position in nuclear engineering, BWXT is a central proxy for the Western onshoring of critical nuclear infrastructure.
